NoPluginSensorsHelpText: No sensors from plugin detected. Make sure the plugin is enabled in the sensor sources window and a refresh was executed.
ServiceConfigurationAdminRequired: Could not configure FanControl service startup. Ensure FanControl is running as administrator.
StartUserLogon: Start app at user log on
TaskSchedulerAdminRequired: Could not set the program to start with Windows in the Task Scheduler. Admin user required.
